content: Self-Refine’s task-focused iterative output polishing and Reflexion’s agentic dynamic memory self-reflection can be combined to create a two-layer hierarchical self-improvement system for autonomous LLMs: the lower Self-Refine layer handles fine-grained polishing of individual task outputs, while the upper Reflexion layer accumulates cross-task reflection patterns to refine the LLM’s general approach to new tasks over time.
